scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @directiveops/scanner && npm run typecheck --workspace @directiveops/parser && npm run typecheck --workspace @directiveops/constitution-model && npm run typecheck --workspace @directiveops/policy-engine && npm run typecheck --workspace @directiveops/oss-types
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @directiveops/scanner && npm run build --workspace @directiveops/parser && npm run build --workspace @directiveops/constitution-model && npm run build --workspace @directiveops/policy-engine && npm run build --workspace @directiveops/oss-types
